description: Module change pending — swap Online Booking for Newsletter; setup +£30, monthly +£3 (locked 2026-05-25 prices)

values.chargeOrRefundLine: your card will be charged £30 (the difference between Newsletter setup and Online Booking setup)
values.monthlyDeltaLine: your subscription goes up by £3/month from next billing cycle

expected.subject: Got your module change — confirming shortly
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Got your update — here's what's about to change.

What's different:
  • Adding: Newsletter
  • Removing: Online Booking

Money side:
  • Setup: your card will be charged £30 (the difference between Newsletter setup and Online Booking setup)
  • Monthly subscription: your subscription goes up by £3/month from next billing cycle

Your new totals:
  • Setup fee: £348
  • Monthly: £38/month

We'll process the payment and email you to confirm — usually
within one working day. After that, any new modules show up
on your hub ready to set up.

Heads-up:
  • You only get one module change before launch, so this is
    it. Anything else needs to wait until after you go live.
  • If you're removing a module you'd already set up, we keep
    your data safe in case you change your mind later.

If anything looks wrong above, hit reply and we'll fix it
before processing the payment.

— ModuForge
